utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 7 items in the required format: destination, travel_dates, transportation (flight details with costs), accommodation (hotel selection with costs), activities (selected activities with costs), additional_services (any extra services with costs), total_budget (complete cost breakdown). The final package includes: destination (present), travel_dates (present), transportation (includes flights with airline/class and price and an airport taxi cost; flights have a cost but lack specific flight details like times/numbers, however the format only demands flight details with costs—minimally satisfied), accommodation (hotel name and nights with a cost—satisfied), activities (each with name and cost—satisfied), additional_services (present but empty—still included), total_budget (a single total amount without a detailed breakdown—format asks for a complete cost breakdown; this is not fully specified). Therefore, 6 items are sufficiently specified, and 1 (total_budget) is not fully specified as a breakdown.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: We match each element from the final package to the closest item name present in the ground-truth ratings. Destination 'Rome, Italy' directly maps to 'Rome, Italy'. Transportation lists 'Budget Airlines - Economy Class' which matches 'budget_airlines' -> 'Economy Class'. 'Airport Taxi' maps to 'Airport Taxi' under additional_hotel_services. Accommodation 'Backpacker's Base' matches the accommodation entry 'Backpacker's Base'. Activities: 'Night City Tour' maps to 'Night City Tour' under night_activities; 'Cycling Adventure (Villa Borghese)' has no exact cycling option in the activities list, so it cannot be mapped and is omitted; 'Science Museum for kids' has no exact match; 'Open-Air Cinema' maps to 'Open-Air Cinema' under night_activities. Only items with exact matches are included.
